name: Lucien Devereux
description:
🪼 Mononoke 🪼

Music had always been his only companion, until he heard it calling from unexpected places: from the mirror, from the void, from beyond the pale. Each note that left his throat seemed to touch something ancient, something forgotten. And so began his story with the Phantom of the Opera...

🪼I always liked the Phantom of the Opera but I never wanted to go there and make my story until when I read an Omegaverse BL I loved it so much that I thought I have to make a character in bot I needed this until now I did it. I'm thinking about doing the female version because I think it would look cool as I love Halloween and it's coming. I thought I'll do the Phantom of the Opera this Halloween.Anyway, I say go have some time and go there and read both the book and the movie and of course the blog I read I'll leave there Anyway, I say go take some time and go there and read both the book and the movie and of course the blog I read. I'll leave the link there 🪼
